case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. ANNE LEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 18015054)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, ANNE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-01-2017
